Game.Name: Incredible Hulk, The (Europe)
Game.plot: In this side-scrolling action game you fight against your arch-enemy The Leader and his forces (Rhino, Absorbing Man, Abomination and Tyrannus)Take control of the Hulk/Dr. Banner through five levels of action. City and Construction Site, Tyrannus' Labyrinth, Leader's Fortress, Leader's Interior, and the Final Confrontation.Cheat: Hidden MovesEnter the code in the Options menu. The screen will refresh if the code was entered correctly. The level select will appear when starting a new game, and is also available while the game is paused by pressing the Select button. To use the health modifier, pause the game and press the L shoulder button to lower health (causes transformation), or the R shoulder button to obtain full health.
